source.notes: Initial skip set seeded from local 1.5 experimentation and validated against the upstream catalog snapshot.

convex-id-generation.reason: Convex generates IDs at insert time; generateId override semantics are not adapter-observable in this runtime.

offset-unsupported.reason: Convex adapter rejects offset pagination; cursor pagination is supported instead.

dynamic-schema-plugin-table.reason: These tests mutate Better Auth schema to add plugin tables/fields at runtime, but current Convex test harness binds schema validators statically.

dynamic-schema-additional-fields.reason: These tests add additional fields at runtime via modifyBetterAuthOptions; static schema validators reject dynamic field changes.

transactions-unsupported.reason: Adapter config sets transaction support to false for Convex adapter.

numeric-id-unsupported.reason: Convex adapter declares supportsNumericIds=false and Better Auth rejects number-id mode for this adapter.

disabledTests.name: create - should use generateId if provided
findMany - should be able to perform a complex limited join
findMany - should find many models with limit and offset
findMany - should find many models with offset
findMany - should find many models with sortBy and limit and offset
findMany - should find many models with sortBy and limit and offset and where
findMany - should find many models with sortBy and offset
findMany - should find many with join and offset
findMany - should find many with join, where, limit, and offset
findOne - should find a model using a uuid
